items.name: FC-25-Mod-Manager

items.description: Silent Crypto Miner is an advanced cryptocurrency mining builder and runtime engine with multi-algorithm CPU/GPU support and intelligent resource management. Create custom mining executables with configurable algorithms, cross-platform output, real-time monitoring, session persistence, thermal throttling, scheduling, and hashrate optimization.

items.name: Advanced_File___Folder_Comparison_Tool
items.description: Compare two files or entire folders and see differences highlighted in detail. Supports text, code, images, and binary files. Ideal for developers and designers.

items.name: Crypto-Checker
items.description: Python-based crypto wallet analysis tool with multi-threaded address and seed phrase checking (up to 50 threads). Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, and EVM networks. Includes proxy rotation, portfolio aggregation, USD valuation, token scanning, and TXT/CSV/JSON export for auditing, research, and analytics.

items.description: Unlock all abilities with unlimited red orbs, infinite Devil Trigger, and all weapons. God mode, one-hit kills, and style rank booster.

items.description: A powerful AI assistant that runs locally on your PC. Automate complex tasks: analyze files, draft emails, write code, schedule meetings, and control applications using natural language commands. No cloud dependency — full privacy.

items.name: Ghostwire__Tokyo_Unlimited_Ether___Health
items.description: Clear the fog with unlimited ether, health, and all abilities. God mode, one-hit kills, and unlimited items.

items.name: Focus_Keeper__Time_Tracking___Distraction_Blocker_

items.name: Microphone___Camera_Hardware_Switch
items.description: Physically disable your microphone and webcam at the driver level. Unlike software mute, this guarantees no app can access them — prevents spyware and accidental activation.
